'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=plhtD4phqxmBqZmE2c7Wf_myJh8OsY21nMd1OS1SFD8-1775208520-1.0.1.1-6oH76yWIAxZ5b1KWOdW3B8t44m9.LM8zheKAr9F4ti4"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
